description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring six individual light fixtures arranged in a circular pattern around a central metallic hub. Each light fixture is topped with a semi-transparent, faceted shade that appears to be made of glass or crystal, giving the piece a sparkling, reflective quality. The arms supporting the shades are elegantly curved and finished in a polished metallic material, likely chrome or nickel, contributing to a luxurious and modern aesthetic. The central stem is twisted and extends upward to a ceiling mount, which is also metallic and matches the rest of the fixture. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with decorative elements that enhance its visual appeal. This sconce is designed to be a statement piece, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A luxurious chandelier-style sconce with six faceted glass or crystal shades on polished metallic arms, arranged in a circular pattern around a central hub. The design is ornate, reflective, and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six faceted shades and the symmetrical arrangement of the metallic arms.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the circular arrangement but with more depth visible in the arms and shades.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the central hub and twisted stem clearly visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view, showing the back of the shades and the attachment to the ceiling mount.
attribute_fixture_design: Modern chandelier design with a luxurious and reflective finish, featuring faceted glass or crystal shades and polished metallic arms. The style is elegant and contemporary, suitable for upscale interiors.
